programme.title: My Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: Mohamedou Ould Salahi and one of his former guards, Steve Wood, reunite in Mauritania 13 years after last seeing each other, rekindling an unlikely relationship that profoundly changed their lives. Mohamedou was a prisoner at Guantanamo Bay for 14 years. During his incarceration he was subjected to torture and solitary confinement, but never charged with a crime. His memoir, Guantanamo Diary, became an international bestseller and was adapted into the film, The Mauritanian.

programme.title: World Cup Slaves
programme.desc: Nepalese men employed in Qatar's construction industry tell Robert Booth how they work for little or no pay as they build the infrastructure ahead of the 2022 football World Cup. Appalling living conditions and unsafe employment are not the only difficulties they face: there is pressure and disbelief from families in Nepal when no money is sent back home

programme.title: The County
programme.sub-title: what happens after police kill someone you love?
programme.desc: When someone dies after an encounter with law enforcement, he leaves behind parents and children, loss and confusion. What's to be done when those people sworn to protect you are the same people who pull the trigger?

programme.title: Qandeel
programme.desc: The life, death and impact of Pakistan's working-class icon Qandeel Baloch, killed in 2016 after becoming a social media celebrity. This film tells Qandeel's story through her own videos and media appearances. A young, fearless woman who collided with Pakistan's mainstream media, Qandeel exposed the religious right and challenged middle-class morality.

programme.title: 'Revenge pornography': Chrissy Chambers' search for justice
programme.desc: In April, it became a crime in England and Wales to post ‘revenge pornography'. Chrissy Chambers and her girlfriend Bria are YouTube's most popular lesbian content creators. The two channels they run have almost half a million subscribers. But before Chrissy came out, she had a boyfriend. He also has videos of her. And she says he's using them to destroy her

programme.title: From California gang to Mexican vigilante | The final interview with a legendary journalist
programme.desc: From California gang to Mexican vigilante: the family man fighting the drug cartels in Mexico | Murdered in Mexico: the final interview with a legendary journalist

programme.title: He died sitting on our front porch: the fight to stop Chicago's gang killings
programme.desc: Over the Fourth of July weekend, over 100 people were shot in Chicago – a worrying increase after the city's murder rate had fallen to its lowest level in 40 years. Adam Gabbatt visits the city's south side to understand why gang violence remains such a problem – and how grassroots groups are working to prevent it

programme.title: My Blonde GF: a disturbing story of deepfake pornography
programme.desc: Helen's world is turned upside down when she discovers that her face has been digitally edited on to images of women in sexually explicit and often violent situations. Helen shares the impact this deepfake pornography has had on her life and challenges a culture that treats women's appearance and image as public property while the perpetrators remain anonymous. Deepfake pornography is an increasingly common form of image-based sexual abuse and in June 2023, an amendment of the online safety bill was announced that criminalises the sharing of deepfake intimate images online.

programme.title: Justice for Adama: the family protesting against police brutality in France
programme.desc: Adama Traoré died in police custody last year. His family's struggle for justice has put police brutality back under the spotlight in France, and his older sister Assa is leading the battle to find out the truth about his death. Iman Amrani looks at how this story paved the way for the recent riots in France, following the alleged rape of a young man called Theo by a police officer. *The figure of 15 deaths in custody every year quoted in the film is based on campaign groups and media tallies. No official figures for deaths in custody are recorded in France.

programme.title: RIP SENI: racism, graffiti and the UK's mental health crisis
programme.desc: One morning in June 2020, graffiti reading RIP SENI appeared emblazoned across a public artwork outside the Bethlem royal hospital, a psychiatric hospital in south London. The spray-painted letters drew attention to Olaseni Lewis, a 23-year-old black man who died after being restrained by 11 police officers while in the care of the hospital in 2010. This film follows what happened after the graffiti, as it launches a discussion about race, mental health and injustice in the UK, and the effects on families.

programme.title: On the road
programme.desc: Hundreds of women operate as sex workers along the Strada Bonifica, the ironically named ‘road of love' on the Adriatic coast of Italy. There has been a huge increase in the number of Nigerian women working along the 10-mile stretch of road – some of whom have been trafficked into the country and forced into prostitution. The film moves between the women's stories, the Italians who live and work there and the local NGO, named On the Road, attempting to support the women

programme.title: Italian mafia's cocaine trafficking leaves trail of drug devastation among poor of Brazil
programme.desc: The all-powerful Calabrian crime syndicate 'Ndrangheta has forged a deadly network of drug trafficking routes through Brazil – 80% of all cocaine arriving in Europe comes through the country's Santos port. To mark International Day against Drug Abuse and Illicit Trafficking, we hear from the anti-'Ndrangheta experts risking their lives to speak out against the syndicate, and take to the streets of Brazil's Crackolândia districts, where crack addiction is destroying lives.

programme.title: The 'Lost Rambos' of Papua New Guinea: how weapons and Hollywood changed tribal disputes
programme.desc: Tribal fighting has long been present in the Papua New Guinea highlands but the influx of modern automatic weaponry in the 1990s turned local disputes into lethal exchanges that threatened to permanently reshape highlands culture. Bootleg copies of the US film Rambo circulated in remote communities, becoming a crude tutorial on the use of such weaponry. The film's influence was so pronounced that the term Rambo is used in Papuan dialects to describe hired mercenaries.

programme.title: Syrian refugees: the dangerous sea journey to Europe | In troubled waters: the rescue crew saving migrants in the Mediterranean
programme.desc: A Syrian refugee, now settled in Coventry, Britain, describes the hardship of the dangerous Mediterranean crossing that brought her to safety. She and another woman share the dream of being reunited with their families, who are both stuck in Greece. | The Guardian spends five days with the Migrants Offshore Aid Station (MOAS) meetings its crew and the migrants it saved.

programme.title: Why I stay: Living inside the ruins of my Gaza home | The London ‘hell' estate fighting back: murders, fires and broken lifts
programme.desc: Samah Khalid Naji is 18, and along with six other members of her family, is living in the bombed-out remains of their house in Deir al-Balah, central Gaza. It was destroyed in October by an Israeli missile strike. The Guardian spent two days with Samah and her family in December to see the remains of their house and how they are surviving the war. | Milford Towers is a social housing estate in Lewisham, south London, slated for demolition and described by its residents as 'hell'.

programme.title: Football helps kids take the right path | Liberi Nantes: a football team made up of refugees
programme.desc: Street children from around the world: 'Football helps kids take the right path' | Liberi Nantes: the first football team in Italy made up of refugees

programme.title: How to make a pearl
programme.desc: For 53 years, John Kapellas enjoyed the bright sky of the western US, but one day he started to burn, blister and break out in rashes whenever he was exposed to light. Now allergic to the entire spectrum of light, Kapellas has spent the last decade living in complete darkness. When one of the side effects of the drugs John was prescribed made him ‘go nuts', he started drawing large abstract pictures on his walls and playing the piano to calm his mind and soothe the pain.

programme.title: La caravana: On the road with the migrant caravan
programme.desc: Thousands of migrants from Honduras, El Salvador and Guatemala head north hoping to find work and a better life in the US. The largest Central American caravan in decades keeps growing as thousands more join this journey – but when they reach Mexico, the migrant caravan starts taking different directions.

programme.title: Behind the scenes of Seahorse documentary | If I die on Mars
programme.desc: If all men got pregnant, it'd be taken more seriously': behind the scenes of Seahorse | If I die on Mars: meet the people on a mission to be first on the red planet ... and stay there

programme.desc: A glamorous Ibiza club DJ wants to sell her designer goods to finance her push to go global, but new handbag specialist Claudia has a big surprise in store for her client.

programme.title: Ben´s Menu
programme.desc: In the thirty-first episode of Ben's Menu, Ben Milbourne and Andy Allen explore Ashgrove's Farm in Elizabeth Town, where they're inspired to make a gourmet ‘mac & cheese' recipe. Ben then explains his easy pickling method and whips up a seasonal tart.

programme.title: Ben´s Menu
programme.desc: In the thirty-second episode of Ben's Menu, Ben Milbourne invites Emma Dean to show her favourite breakfast recipe. Then, Ben experiments with a Spanish rice dish and finishes with a malty dessert.

programme.title: Ben´s Menu
programme.desc: In the thirty-third episode of Ben's Menu, Ben Milbourne cooks on location with fresh Huon salmon. Then back home in his kitchen, Ben slow cooks a succulent midweek curry before Lynton Tapp treats Ben to a special family recipe.

programme.title: Ben´s Menu
programme.desc: In the thirty-forth episode of Ben's Menu, Ben Milbourne learns some trade secrets from Scotty the Butcher before throwing together a creamy tomato and thyme pasta.

programme.title: Ben´s Menu
programme.desc: In the thirty-fifth episode of Ben's Menu, Ben Milbourne visits Mrs Jones' where he indulges in some crab rice-paper rolls. Ben then concocts a flavoursome Moroccan salad and Amy Luttrell spoils Ben with her signature ice cream sandwiches.

programme.title: Rosehaven
programme.desc: Daniel finds himself back living and working with his best friend Emma - but things have changed while he was away. Emma sold a house, now she's more of a real estate agent than him.

programme.title: Rosehaven
programme.desc: Daniel has an appointment to give a speech at his old school. Everything goes horribly wrong but he does make some difference.

programme.title: Betty White's Off Their Rockers,
programme.desc: Pranks include Wink Martindale getting surprising news while pretending to tape a game show, a woman asking for help after her dog gets stuck in an strange place, and two pranksters setting up a metal detector on the street.

programme.title: Betty White's Off Their Rockers,
programme.desc: Pranks include a lost skydiver asking for directions, an older woman ordering a younger man online and a prankster repeatedly hugging a stranger.

programme.title: Jason Weems: Unknown
programme.desc: In 2017, Jason Weems died after a stand-up comedy performance. He awoke 16-hours later in the hospital labeled as “Unknown”. This life altering experience re-ignited his comedic drive to never allow his life or his talent to be overlooked again.

programme.title: Seinfeld S4E9
programme.desc: A simple night out turns into a nightmare when Jerry meets Elaine at the opera -- unaware that her new boyfriend is "Crazy Joe Davola," the maniac who's been stalking him and vowing revenge for some imagined slight.

programme.title: Seinfeld S4E10
programme.desc: A procrastinating Jerry and George strain to think of an idea for a TV series just hours before meeting with impatient network honchos. But Jerry can't forget about his date with a beautiful young woman who confesses to him that she's still a virgin -- putting even more pressure on him.

programme.title: Seinfeld S4E11
programme.desc: Jerry challenges George, Kramer and Elaine to pool their money in a contest of self-denial. Meanwhile, an excited Elaine looks forward to her date with hunky John Kennedy, Jr., and a guilt-ridden George gets an eyeful when he visits his whining mother in the hospital.

programme.title: Seinfeld S4E12
programme.desc: On a flight home, Jerry parties in first class with a beautiful woman while Elaine suffers in a cramped coach seat next to a dead fat man. On the ground, George and Kramer scramble between airports trying to meet their friends -- until Kramer is chased onto a runway by police.

programme.title: Seinfeld S4E13
programme.desc: Elaine is mortified when she accidentally reveals a bit too much d'colletage on her Christmas card, which she has sent out to everyone she knows. Meanwhile, Jerry tries to convince his skeptical new girlfriend, a model, that he practices good hygiene. Elsewhere, Kramer is asked to pose for a risqué underwear advertisement.

programme.title: Seinfeld S4E14
programme.desc: Jerry takes pity on a poor foreigner whose important immigration papers were mistakenly left in his unopened mailbox. But the luckless man swears vengeance when he is hustled away for deportation back to his native country. Down the hall, a resourceful Kramer returns from his fantasy baseball camp after having punched out his idol, Mickey Mantle.

programme.title: Seinfeld S4E15
programme.desc: A comedy of errors kicks in when Jerry is frustrated in his attempts to squeeze in two comedy appearances on opposite sides of town while shadowed by a pesky fellow comedian. Later, Jerry's bad timing continues when he has to rendezvous for a movie with George, Elaine and Kramer -- who are all in different orbits looking for seats as well as each other.

programme.title: Seinfeld S4E16
programme.desc: When an eavesdropping college reporter mistakenly prints that Jerry and his pal George are intimate longtime companions, Jerry vainly works overtime to prove his straightness. And when the big-city newspapers pick up the story, Jerry has a lot of explaining to do to his overwrought parents.

programme.title: Seinfeld S4E17
programme.desc: Jerry and George scramble to keep their feeble idea for a TV series alive when they meet with a skeptical TV executive who catches them eyeing his teenage daughter's cleavage. Across town, Kramer begins dating Jerry's ex-girlfriend, a chef who becomes obsessed with possessing Elaine's fashionable shoes.

programme.title: Seinfeld S4E2
programme.desc: While searching for Kramer in Los Angeles, Jerry and George are picked up for questioning by the police, who suspect Kramer is a notorious serial killer known as the smog stranger.

programme.title: Seinfeld S4E3
programme.desc: Jerry and George propose to write a television series.

programme.title: Seinfeld S4E4
programme.desc: Newman blames Kramer for his speeding ticket Jerry and George are offered a deal at NBC.

programme.title: Seinfeld S4E5
programme.desc: Jerry must be at his most creative when he has to explain to his visiting parents why he isn't wearing the watch they once gave him -- a timepiece that Jerry discarded in a trashcan. And pal George stupidly throws away the pair's fledgling series commitment from a TV network.

programme.title: The Nanny S2E17
programme.desc: Fran confides in an attractive male that she thinks is gay.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: A man is recorded surviving two lightning strikes moments apart, cameras spot strange lights in the sky in Norway and a bizarre, glowing object is caught on tape at a museum, leaving some to wonder if it's an alien artifact.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: An eerie creature is recorded stalking Georgia's ancient forest, terrifying explosions rock the streets of Manhattan and cameras record a mysterious object diving into a deadly volcano.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Experts worry a Louisiana town could be in danger when a nearby swamp devours 100-foot trees., a high-speed police chase ends when the fugitive makes an impossible getaway and three cars are recorded mysteriously levitating.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies
programme.desc: Craig and Sarah take on the US Navy's Unidentified Aerial Phenomenon videos: the 'Tic-Tac' footage, filmed from the USS Nimitz in 2004, and the 'Go-Fast' and 'Gimbal' videos filmed between 2014 and 2015 from the USS Theodore Roosevelt.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies
programme.desc: Craig and Sarah pore over every scrap of available evidence relating to the Rendlesham incident, including the audio recording made by Lieutenant Colonel Charles Halt when he and a patrol of men investigated lights in the forest that fateful night.

programme.title: River Hunters
programme.desc: The river hunters' final hunt takes the team back into Yorkshire to uncover relics at Knaresborough Castle from the brutal 14th Century clashes between the English and the Scottish.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: New developments in science and research have invented equipment that may have much more sinister capabilities than we are being led to believe. Are governments around the world using weather control to incite the next World War?

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Experts worry a Louisiana town could be in danger when a nearby swamp devours 100-foot trees., a high-speed police chase ends when the fugitive makes an impossible getaway and three cars are recorded mysteriously levitating.

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Former `Top Gear' presenter and opinionated `The Sunday Times' and `The Sun' columnist Jeremy Clarkson presents the rebooted version of `Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?', the 12-question quiz with a £1,000,000 prize. Each contestant can use three traditional lifelines: 50-50 which removes half of the answers, Ask the Audience which polls the studio audience for their answer, and Phone a Friend, wherein the contestant can call a friend for 30 seconds to ask for their advice. However, there is now a fourth lifeline: Ask the Host, where the contestant can ask Clarkson if he knows the answer to the question, and there is also a new second `safety net', previously set at £32,000, which is now able to be set by the contestant themselves. Also, contestants must first win their chance to play the quiz by winning the Fastest Fingers First round, competing against other potential players to be the quickest to answer a question with sequenced answers.

programme.title: Posh Pawn
programme.desc: In this episode, pawn shop boss James gets an exciting enquiry about a passenger jet simulator, which sees him take to the skies and debate a loan of 150,000 pounds. A pilates instructor hopes her designer handbag collection will fund the trip of a lifetime, but will designer handbag expert Claudia agree? A stunning diamond and sapphire necklace is brought in to pay for the launch of a new skincare product, and James shows his softer side when a client is in danger of losing his beloved silver collection.

programme.title: Posh Pawn
programme.desc: In this episode, high-end pawnbroker James finds himself getting a little cosy with staff member Lawrence, as he swaps his usual fast cars for something smaller - a Peel Trident bubble car. Designer handbag expert Claudia examines a bag which once belonged to music and TV celebrity Sharon Osbourne, a stunning collection of Iranian, diamond and sapphire jewellery gets brought in to help renovate a villa in Cyprus, and the staff try to impress James to win the coveted title of employee of the month.

programme.title: Posh Pawn

programme.title: Colin And Justin's Home Heist
programme.desc: Patti, Ernie and their three sons live together… But you wouldn't think there was a man in the house based on the home's dreadful, ultra-girly décor. The home features pink walls, pink curtains, and pink furniture… And from spoons and dolls to treasures and teddy bears, every corner is filled with collectibles. After an ambush at the local fire station, Colin and Justin vow to transform the home into a bold, bright and beautiful haven for the whole family. (S1 E26)

programme.title: Colin And Justin's Home Heist
programme.desc: Alice is a devoted Mom with terrible taste… And her gloomy home is proof. From the random canary cage to the chicken motif wallpaper in the kitchen, her otherwise handsome Victorian home features cave-like, grandma décor… And, since she never finishes what she starts, incomplete paint and craft projects loom everywhere. After an ambush at her kids' soccer practice, Colin and Justin vow to breathe life into her home — and into Alice herself. (S2 E01)

programme.title: Charlie's Angels (1976) S1E8
programme.desc: A sexploitation empire is threatened when its nude centerfold models are mysteriously murdered in "Lady Killer," on "Charlie's Angels." Angel Jill becomes a candidate for the centerfold of Feline Magazine, hoping to tempt the hand of the murderer of two previous models. There are many suspects on the magazine's staff and the in fighting is so intense that attempts on the lives of undercover employees Kelly and Sabrina further cloud the investi-gation. A waterbed is wired to electrocute Sabrina, and Kelly gets into trouble posing as a standup comedienne at the Feline "Kitty" Club. During the confusion Jill finds herself nearly alone - facing a killer who murders, then mutilates models with a pair of pinking shears. Kate Jackson, Farrah Fawcett and Jaclyn Smith star as the Angels, Sabrina, Jill and Kelly, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophisticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels (1976) S1E9
programme.desc: Beautiful, intelligent and ultra-sophisticated, "Charlie's Angels" are everything a man could dream of...and way more than they could ever handle! Receiving their orders via speaker phone from their never seen boss, Charlie, the Angels employ their incomparable sleuthing and combat skills, as well as their lethal feminine charm, to crack even the most seemingly insurmountable of cases.

programme.title: Premiere: Ted Hill
programme.desc: Hill's debut stand-up show about every single US president and how they saved his life. From Washington to Biden, Ted talks about his recovery from mental breakdown and includes a joke about each and every US president. It's just your standard coming-of-age, multimedia, mental health recovery, every single US president sort of stand-up show we're all so used to these days. Featuring silly graphs, silly drawings, silly jokes and more.Absolutely no knowledge of US presidents required for this emotional, high-energy, multimedia mischief. (S2023 E710)

programme.title: Aaron Woodall: Sad and Needy

programme.title: Cory Michaelis: Bad Teacher
programme.desc: A teacher by day and comic by night, Cory Michaelis keeps his act edgy enough to keep the audience from feeling like they're in his 10th grade History class. He cleverly tells short stories and jokes that try to get audiences to think but are silly and absurd as well. Cory is a regular in all of the clubs in the Pacific Northwest and has headlined clubs, colleges, casinos, and weird bars all over the country. (S2018 E585)

programme.title: Adam Cozens: Anyway...Here's Adam Cozens

programme.title: Wild Travels
programme.desc: Will tries and fails to ride an alligator at Orlando's Gatorland drops in on the only used car dealership with a priceless collection of Muhammad Ali memorabilia in New Hampshire dabbles in the paranormal at the abandoned and haunted West Virginia State Penitentiary and then meets an outrageous artist who is creating a psychedelic city block in Pittsburgh known as “Randyland.”

programme.title: Wild Travels
programme.desc: Will learns the hazards and rewards of professional Golf Ball Diving in Kissimmee, Florida considers defecting to a foreign country at a library that sits smack dab on the Vermont – Canadian border discovers a Hari Krishna commune with an incredible “Palace of Gold” in the hills of West Virginia marvels at outdoor sculptures at the African-American Heritage Museum in Hammond, Louisiana, and catches his breath in Donora, Pennsylvania at the world's only “Smog Museum.”

programme.title: Wild Travels
programme.desc: Will meets Mr. Pierogi, Ms. Pasczki and the polka-loving Pierorgettes at Pierogi Fest in Whiting, Indiana ducks for cover at Lambert's Café in Alabama discovers where the bullets are buried in Tombstone Arizona's Bird Cage theater is shocked by the products made from endangered animals confiscated by the National Wildlife Property Repository near Denver and cheers on the daring (and possibly deranged) participants at a Unicycle Football game in San Marcos, Texas.

programme.title: Q: Alabama's Barbecue Legends
programme.desc: The story of Alabama barbecue can't be told in sentences. It's told through whiffs of smoke, buckets of sauce and friendly nods across the counter. See how a simple dish has become a culinary anthem for Alabama.

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: A romantic trip to Colorado takes a windy turn when Jason pushes Tayler, despite her hesitation, to summit Mt. Democrat in 70 mph winds and -19 degree weather. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: Jason loves mountain biking. Tayler prefers to read a book. Jason is up for any adventure tossed at him. Tayler likes to be a bit more prepared. Will the adventures that await in Arkansas leave the couple questioning if they have anything in common? (S1 E02)

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: Tayler and Jason travel to Eureka Springs, Arkansas, a town with a rich history and home to one of the most haunted hotels in America, The Crescent. Jason convinces Tayler to stay one night, but will that stay lead to a night they don't want to remember? (S1 E03)

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: Jason experiences insecurity about challenges that the couple are, quite literally, dropped into. From falling out of the sky to a rappel into a dark cave, will the couple be able to work together or will they end up stranded in the dark? (S1 E04)

programme.title: National Parks Top Ten
programme.desc: Mind-blowing marvels at America's most beautiful locations are highlighted, from Death Valley's mysterious sailing stones to a man-made mirage in Joshua Tree National Park. (S1 E07)

programme.title: UN Under-Secretary-General
programme.desc: This is Westminster, the House of Parliament in London. Its oldest and most exclusive institution, is the House of Lords. Here, for centuries and generations, members of the British landed aristocracy have been holding on to their pomp, duties and privileges. Today the Leader of the House of Lords is a woman. On top of it, she's black. An extraordinary story and quite a character. Come and meet Baroness Amos of Brondesbury.

programme.title: The Dream Forge
programme.desc: As time runs out to face the Dream Forge and become official Dream Chasers, Mateo and his friends enlist the help of the mysterious Dream Bandit.

programme.title: Legendary Places, Ninjago's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Cole joins Jay and Zane inside the Nindroid to solve a mysterious puzzle and also Kai enters Zane's mind and suggests the Ninja take a break from puzzle-solving to figure out which villain is trying to hack their friend.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?

programme.title: Girls on Mission
programme.desc: Things are getting mixed up on Andrea's first day on the job at Heartlake City Juicebar. Olivia tapes a science show, with a little help from Mia's lemonade stand - and special effects! Mia and Stephanie have to use a little horse power at the Sunshine Ranch. Andrea relaxes at the beach while Emma is hard at work at her lifeguard tower. Emma and Stephanie accidentally rent a scary movie and suddenly there are beasts everywhere... Stephanie has to face her fears when the class gets an 'Animal Kingdom & 'school assignment.'

programme.title: The Hands Of Time
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time. But the arrival of the first Time Blade – a weapon with the power to speed up time – sends the Ninja to the Monastery just in time to rescue their master from certain doom.

programme.title: The Hatching
programme.desc: The Ninja learn more about the Krux and Acronix – the two fallen Elemental Masters known as the Hands of Time – and are sure that this threat has finally been eliminated. But with Wu out of action and suffering from the effects of the Time Punch, the Ninja discover a new enemy in their midst: The Vermillion Warriors. And the Ninjas have no idea who controls them...

programme.title: A Time Of Traitors
programme.desc: Kai's investigation of a Vermillion Warrior Helmet leads him to discover that Krux is alive and well in Ninjago, living under an assumed identity. Meanwhile, as the Vermillion Warriors go on a kidnapping spree, Lloyd struggles with his role as master-in-training and Nya does her best to reboot Zane, who was knocked off line in his first battle with the Vermillion.

programme.title: The Mask Of Deception
programme.desc: When an unknown criminal syndicate threatens the Royal Family, the Ninja are called back into action and must protect the royal princess and a fabled artifact that may hold supernatural powers. The ninja find themselves scattered to the four corners of the kingdom. Cole and Jay are searching in vain for some sign of Master Wu. Nya fights injustice in the north, while Kai and Zane attempt to fend off an angry lava beast in the west. This leaves Lloyd alone in Ninjago City. He rushes to the scene of a heist at Borg Tower and finds himself up against a team of highly trained operatives led by the mysterious masked MISTER-E. Lloyd fails to prevent the heist and an ancient artifact, the MASK OF DECEPTION, is stolen. Lloyd apprehends one of the criminals but the others escape. Dismayed by his failure, Lloyd calls the ninjas back to Ninjago. The friends are reunited and hope for a little rest and relaxation. These hopes are dashed with the arrival MASTER HUTCHINS, a servant of the Royal Family of Ninjago, who has been sent by the EMPEROR to request their help. A new criminal gang, SONS OF GARMADON (SOG), is attempting to acquire three ancient masks called the ONI MASKS, which are rumored to possess supernatural powers.

programme.title: The Gray Knight
programme.desc: Using his Stone to Life magic the Cloud of Monstrox turns Clay into a living, fighting, breathing stone fighting knight. But will Clay use his forces to fight for good or for evil? Does he have a choice? The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro are able to unlock the forbidden Power Shocking Scare and unleash an attack on the village of Bravington. Knights in their new vehicles rush to the rescue and are able to defeat him with a new Combo Power. In the heat of the battle, the Cloud of Monstrox sees the stone statue of Clay and zaps him to life! Clay is now turned, and is fighting against his friends. It is impossible for them to defeat him without destroying him for good. The Cloud urges Clay on. He attacks the Fortrex in order to get to Merlok. Robin in his Black Knight Mech is trying to stop him, but to no avail. Merlok 2.0 is left undefended. At the very last moment Merlok 2.0 unleashes a blasting spell that sends Clay far far away.

programme.title: The Good, The Bad And The Tightwad
programme.desc: Clay wakes up in the poor town of Nothing Hill which literally have nothing. Will Clay remember who he is and what he is fighting for. His friends try to help him, but Jorah Tightwad and his Bots get in the way. Clay as the Gray Knight wakes up far away in a place called Nothing Hill. A poor town where they literally have nothing. They harvest dust. Jorah Tightwad though has found that there is gold underneath the town. He convinces the confused Clay to help him put pressure on the poor townsfolk to give up their lots. This is an easy job for the strong Gray Knight. The NEXO KNIGHTS finally track him down and tries to convince him about who he is. But to the Gray Knight they are still his enemies, and a giant battle ensues in order to subdue the Gray Knight. At last, only Macy is left. When she begins to recite the Knights Code, some words and their meaning are able to get through the stone hard shell of the Gray Knight and the Evil that clouded him seems to disappear. Together they are able to return the ownership of the town to the villagers.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Mutiny On The Smurf: King Symphonium sends his pelican, Satchelmouth, to scoop up Brainy's orchestra and carry them to his island. Dreamy takes the helm of a ship to set sail for their rescue. When Dreamy gets seasick, Brainy takes command and leads the rescue party that frees the captured Smurfs.

programme.title: Reckless Smurfs
programme.desc: This time, Gargamel's plan cannot fail. Undeterred by Azrael's derisive cackling, the evil wizard perfects a magic substance called Daredevil Dust, which is going to change all the Smurfs into rash, incautious swashbucklers. Will Papa Smurf fall into Gargamel's trap? Will their enemy catch all the Smurfs? Will this story have a happy ending?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurfs' Time Capsule: As the Smurfs busily build a time capsule for all of their talents, Papa Smurf frantically tries to unravel an ancient Druid riddle before disaster strikes the forest.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurfs' Springtime: The wicked wizard Gargamel asks the sorcerer Balthazar for a recipe to capture the Smurfs. It involves kidnapping Mother Nature to stop the arrival of Spring. Luckily, the Smurfs save the day.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Handy's Sweetheart: Handy learns it's better to have smurfed than not to have smurfed at all when he learns his true love is really a mermaid. Can they really live with each other forever?

programme.title: Foul Weather Smurf
programme.desc: Handy invents a weather machine that will allow the Smurfs to control their environment at will. Unfortunately, they cannot agree on whether it should rain or be sunny so the machine overloads and explodes.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hefty's Heart: Gargamel infects Hefty's heart with hate and then uses the little Smurf as a decoy for the others. Fortunately, Hefty's love overcomes his hate and he helps his little friends escape from Gargamel's clutches.

programme.title: Skyscraper Smurfs
programme.desc: Sure, a village of mushroom-shaped houses is nice and jolly... But not very modern, in Architect Smurf's view. What the Smurfs need is smurfdominium, a new, daring concept that will change the art of living forever...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Little Smurf Confidence: Papa Smurf gives Weakling a special cream to wear that will restore his strength. Shortly after, he is awarded for his daring deeds of strength and his confidence really soars when he realizes the cream is smurfberry jam.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Calling Dr Smurf: As his name implies, Dabbler Smurf is incapable of staying put in any one activity. He goes from one pursuit to another with the greatest of ease and never finishes what he's begun. But suddenly here he is smitten by the love of the medical profession. Dabbler wants to become a doctor and all of the Smurfs, with Papa Smurf in the lead, are going to help him to achieve his wish.

programme.title: A Gift For Papa's Day
programme.desc: Gargamel steals Papa Smurf's birthday hat to lure the Smurfs into a trap. Papa tricks Gargamel into releasing them and then keeps the unusual hat to remind everyone of their great escape.

programme.title: Futuresmurfed
programme.desc: Balthazar the Enchanter is a man of vision. He knows that the times of alchemy are drawing to their end. The future belongs to those who will understand science...but how can he see into the future? Perhaps by kidnapping Father Time. The Smurfs will help to put things right after Little Thunder, a dinosaur, escapes through a gash in the fabric of time.

programme.title: Heart Of Gold
programme.desc: Whatever Brainy Smurf says, the Clockwork Smurf devised by Handy has feelings just like any normal blue Smurf. At least it seems to be so until Clockwork Smurf loses what Handy had fitted inside its ribcage: a heart of gold. When the evil wizard Gargamel and his apprentice Scruple find the tiny contraption and fit it with a heart of stone, the Smurfs are in for a bad time...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Never Smurf Off Till Tomorrow: A fierce wind carries the Smurfs' windmill away, with several Smurfs inside. Is Lazy Smurf really at fault or is an injustice being committed? Are the captive Smurfs going to be saved from the volcano's crater? Is Brainy going to smurf up his mouth for a moment?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sassette: Snappy and Nat steal Gargamel's formula to make another Smurf – a female to be a companion to Smurfette. They create Sassette, who causes mischief wherever she goes. Papa uses his Smurfiness Solution to turn Gargamel's evil Sassette into a playful Smurfy Sassette.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Golden Smurf Award: Hogatha disguises herself as the Golden Smurf Award to catch the Smurfs in order to use them as the main ingredient in her beauty cream. Vanity convinces her to try his recipe and before long, the wicked sorceress is covered with mud and sent careening over the hills into Gargamel's house.

programme.title: Queen Smurfette
programme.desc: Smurfette becomes Queen for a day on her birthday. But this gets out of hand when Father Time falls asleep, neglecting to end the days. Tempers begin to flare among the Smurfs, who are tired of servitude. Papa rushes to wake Father Time and brings peace again to Smurfland.

programme.title: The Smurfs And The Money Tree
programme.desc: The wicked wizard Gargamel has come up with yet another diabolical plan with the help of his mother, who isn't much nicer than him. He wants to tempt the Smurfs with money of which they have no notion. Will Greedy take the bait?

programme.title: Speak For Yourself, Farmer Smurf
programme.desc: Farmer hides his love for Smurfette by assuming a disguise and sending her poems. When they finally meet, they are captured by Bigmouth and in their struggle to get free, they discover their mutual friendship.

programme.title: Smurf On The Run
programme.desc: Little things can sometimes bring about big effects. In trying to catch Sassette, Gargamel upsets the Balance of Truth, and from then on everybody in the world tells lies. Even Papa Smurf is changed into a pathological liar. What is more, the Spirit of the Scales chain Gargamel and Sassette to each other, and together they have to replace the Topaz of Truth....

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little boy show us how to make a Turban. The Tubbies go for a walk, but Po, Laa-Laa and Dipsy want to play with their favourite things.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Sarah and Mark give their sheep a winter-feed. In Teletubbyland, the Teletubbies cannot decide whether to have Tubby Custard or Tubby Toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa dances with her ball. A little boy tells us why he likes to live in his block of flats. A balloon appears in Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies follow a balloon.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky calls the other Tubbies to come and watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story about the naughty sock. The Tubby Toast machine makes a tower of tubby toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Matthew and James help their uncle milk the cows. In Teletubbyland, the Tubby Custard machine isn't working, so they sing a special 'Tubby Custard' song. Then, the Tubby Custard machine works again.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch a little boy peel and mash some eggs for an egg mayonnaise sandwich. The Teletubbies laugh when they make a tune whilst eating their Tubby Custard.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies leave their favourite things to watch some boys spinning some spinning tops to celebrate the Hanukah festival. Tinky Winky wears the skirt on his head to do a very special round and round dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po fetches the other to watch Andy Brown and two children look for some rabbits. In Teletubbyland, Tinky Winky is looking for Po. He looks for her everywhere, but she is hiding from him. When he finds her all the Tubbies dance a happy dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises to tell the Teletubbies 'Christmas is a Coming'. They hurry up the slide to see some children decorate a Christmas Tree. The Teletubbies get excited when their own Christmas Tree appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number three. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa go for a walk. They count three trees and three flowers and Po follows behind counting too.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: In Teletubbyland, the Tubbies are trying to be quiet. They watch Oscar read the story of the Gingerbread Boy to his brother Felix. A voice trumpet appears and sings the nursery rhyme.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Samira and her friends show the Teletubbies their gymnastic routines. The Teletubbies do their own gymnastics.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson has his hands full when he's confronted by a tough little Blader named Daichi. Just as they're about to battle another mysterious Blader named Jin shows up and wants to challenge Tyson as well. All three Bladers mix it up but Ray puts a stop to the fight when he realizes that Tyson can't handle two Bladers at once.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Daichi continues to annoy Tyson with his constant battle challenges, which Tyson refuses to give in to - even after an embarrassing confrontation at the public swimming pool proves that Daichi is an impressive and highly skilled Beyblader.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson's alone and picking up the pieces of what used to be The Bladebreakers... Daichi won't leave him alone, and Kai is...well, Kai...at least he's got the championships to look forward too, right? Meanwhile, both Ray and Max are going through the growing pains of being part of a new team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: At the preliminaries for the World Championships, Daichi wins his matches easily, establishing himself as a new powerhouse on the Beyblading scene. Kenny also competes, defeating his opponents with such skill that even Tyson is impressed.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: There's only one round left in the tournament to decide who's going to partner up with Tyson in the World Beyblade Tag Team Championships and it's between Daichi and Kai.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The Block A and Block B finals of the Beyblade World Championships are underway. Max wins his match and finds himself partnered with a real bully of a blader named Rick.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution Team heads to a remote training camp to prepare for the upcoming tournament. When they first arrive, Hiro tells Tyson that Kai has quit the team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution team fly to New York City for the Beyblade World Championships. The normally feisty Daichi proves to be afraid of flying, and once in the city, he becomes overwhelmed by the size and scope of things in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The teams have been selected and the finals are about to begin...Unfortunately Tyson finds himself facing all of his former friends...each part of a team that he will eventually have to 'blade against.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson blames his embarrassing loss to Ray on Daichi, telling the team he's better off competing alone. As Tyson runs away, the US Finals continue with Rick of the PPB All Starz against Claude of Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The Beyblade World Tag Team Championships are about to start in Rome as Barthez busily prepares his team for the big event. He's even invited a television news crew to document his efforts as a coach.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson gets in a huff and leaves the team after he is dropped from the lineup against the Blitzkrieg Boys. This leaves Kenny and Daichi to pick up the slack against their opponents.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: In the second of a best of three match, Tala thinks he's broken Kenny down, but Kenny summons his inner strength and attacks with all of his combined power. Unfortunately, it's not enough, and Tala shatters Kenny's Hopper into pieces with his Novae Rog attack.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: In Madrid for the Spanish leg of the World Championships, the hard-of-sleeping Lee has a nightmare that Ray kicks him off the team for his poor play. The day before their next match, White Tiger X encounters a pair of beyblading jugglers in Madrid's main square, who also happen to be trick bladers.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: As Max prepares to face Kai in the next round, the members of BBA Revolution overhear a confrontation between Johnny and Robert of the Majestics and Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Beyblade

programme.title: The Amazing Spiez
programme.desc: The Spiez are sent to protect a famous TV spy actor from various incidents. To keep an eye on him, the Spiez are invited to be in his Spy show, with the guidance of their parents who think they won a contest. The actor is kidnapped and the Spiez rescue him. (S1 E05)

programme.title: When I Was Your Age

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The adventures of Dennis, his dog Gnasher, and their best friends JJ, Rubi and Pieface. The team cause havoc to Walter, Beanotown and Bash Street School, where all the rules go out the window. (S3 E01)

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher: Stunt Gran
programme.desc: Walter shows off some new tricks on his fancy skateboard, prompting Dennis to make a jibe that even his Gran could do tricks like that with such a high-tech boar and the bet is on! However, Walter secretly sabotages the trick, causing Gran to hang up her menacing shoes as a matter of public safety. It's up to Dennis, Gnasher and Angel Face to expose the truth and get Gran back to her wily self. Followed by more Dennis episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules!

Later, Megan goes missing after getting her new skateboard that she will use to show her brothers that she can skate. Lee, Marc and Tony find her with an army of skateboarders responsible for breaking down the buildings so they can create skateparks for themselves. (S1 E04)

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Athena gets Gnasher envy when seeing a pampered version of Gnasher in a magazine and when she hears that Dennis owns an Abyssinian wire-haired tripe hound (Gnasher), she wants him. However, being an owner to Gnasher isn't all cracked up to be! Followed by 'Splash'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis gets a case of the hiccups from Mr. Har Har's can-o-giggles and is looking for a way to cure them ready for a film premier. Followed by Athena's Party

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After watching a film about an alien invasion, Dennis, Curly and Pie Face decide to make their own film. However, Walter stumbles across them filming, and he only sees the action, not the camera. Filming what he sees on his mobile phone, he runs to tell the whole of Beanotown about the alien invasion. As panic spreads, Dennis and his friends discover the chaos and decide to keep filming in order to help make the best of their own alien film. Meanwhile, Sergeant Slipper investigates the alien landing that Walter has seen, and discovers the truth—that the spaceship is a playhouse with glow sticks in it. Followed by 'Castle in the Air'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Dennis breaks his bike, Dad is unable to afford a new one, so Dennis convinces him to ask his boss for a raise. Unfortunately, Mr Scrimp reduces his wages instead. Dennis then trashes his house to convince Scrimp that his family are poor, so that Mr Scrimp will feel compelled to raise Dad's wages. Just as Scrimp has been taken in by Dennis' plan, Mum and Dad arrive home laden with shopping bags, resulting in Dad getting fired on the spot. Dennis resolves to get Dad his old job back by secretly causing chaos at his office. To restore order Scrimp rehires Dad, sealing the deal with a generous pay rise. Mum and Dad repair the house, but still don't have enough money to buy Dennis a new bike, instead it gets repaired with Dad's office rubber bands and paperclips. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dennis Hiccups'.

programme.title: Love Finds You in Sugarcreek
programme.desc: A father and son fleeing a shocking and brutal tragedy settle in the predominantly Amish town of Sugarcreek, Ohio. They are taken in by three sisters who offer the father work as a handyman, but a local policewoman begins to become suspicious of his past.

programme.title: Island of Grace
programme.desc: For Megan, matters of faith are to be hidden from her friends and coworkers. Her social life and the way she wants to live come first. But when she goes on a business trip with two coworkers- the arrogant office crush Mark, and the office nobody, Chris-her plane crashes, and she's forced to reexamine her life. Stranded on an island in a far corner of the world, Megan begins a journey not just of survival, but discovering herself and what really matters.

programme.title: Ruling of the Heart
programme.desc: Judge Morgan has become known for his no-nonsense toughness in court. He rules fast and he rules hard, barely noticing the person on the other end of his decisions. When he gets stuck in a cafe during a snowstorm, he is surprised to discover two of the other customers stranded with him happen to be people recently in his court, with verdicts handed down that have made him very unpopular. As the night unfolds in the small cafe, unexpected truth emerges from both sides that changes everything.

Set in WWII - when German soldier, Stefan (Jai Courtney: Suicide Squad), goes on a mission to investigate exiled German Monarch Kaiser Wilhelm II (Christopher Plummer: The Girl With The Dragon Tattoo), he ends up falling dangerously in love with Mieke (Lily James: Cinderella) one of the housemaids. All is fair in love and war.

programme.title: Killing JFK
programme.desc: Killing JFK: 50 Questions Answered is a fast-paced special that unravels 50 fascinating questions and mysteries surrounding the assassination of President Kennedy. From the reason behind his ill-fated trip to Dallas, to what became of the First Lady's bloody dress, nearly every aspect of the tragedy is touched upon.

programme.title: Spy Cat
programme.desc: Spoiled and innocent, chubby house cat Marnie lives a comfortable and pampered life in the Sunshine household. She has never ventured outside the family home and only knows about the real world through her favourite detective, crime TV-shows. When Paul, who can't stand his sister's spoiled pet, abandons Marnie at a rural petrol station she comes across a loyal band of drifters who join forces to capture a notorious, local gang of petty thieves.

programme.title: Miracle In Milan
programme.desc: An old woman finds a baby among the cauliflowers in her garden. She takes care of the orphan, and calls him Totò. When she dies, he is sent to an orphanage, which he leaves as a teenager.

programme.title: Moonlighting
programme.desc: A Polish contractor, Nowak, leads a group of workmen to London so they can provide cheap labor for a government official based there. Nowak (Irons) has to manage the project and the men as they encounter the tempations of the West and loneliness and separation from their families. Nowak is the only one of the group who speaks English, and he uses this as a tool over his team. When the unrest in Poland leads to a military takeover, Nowak is faced with a much more difficult situation than he expected.

programme.title: Mr Wong Doomed To Die
programme.desc: Mr. Wong and a girl reporter investigate a shipping magnate's murder.

programme.title: Mr Wong In Chinatown
programme.desc: A pretty Chinese woman, seeking help from San Francisco detective James Lee Wong, is killed by a poisoned dart in his front hall, having time only to scrawl "Captain J" on a sheet of paper. She proves to be Princess Lin Hwa.

programme.title: Mr Wong The Fatal Hour
programme.desc: When Captain Street's best friend Dan Grady is murdered, Street enlists the help of Chinese detective James Lee Wong. Mr. Wong uncovers a smuggling ring on the waterfront of San Francisco and unmasks the killer, though not until several more murders occur.

programme.title: Kickboxer
programme.desc: When kickboxing champ Eric Sloane is crippled in the ring by the evil Tong Po, Eric's younger brother, Kurt, seeks vengeance.

programme.title: Dead Cert
programme.desc: A gang of London gangsters get more than they bargained for when a group of businessmen make an offer to buy their club.

programme.title: Magic Mike
programme.desc: Stripper Mike Lane has plans to leave the raunchy dance scene in favor of starting his own furniture business. Before he gets out he has one last challenge to train a young protégé on the ins and outs of the business.

programme.title: Timeline: Timeline
programme.desc: Based on the Michael Crichton novel. TIMELINE tells the story of a professor who inadvertently catapults himself back to 14th-century France, in the middle of the 100 Years War.

programme.title: The Congress
programme.desc: An aging, out-of-work actress accepts one last job, though the consequences of her decision affect her in ways she didn't consider.

programme.title: Vivarium
programme.desc: On their search for the perfect home, Gemma (Imogen Poots) and Tom (Jesse Eisenberg) visit a new house in a labyrinthine suburban neighborhood. When they attempt to leave, each road mysteriously takes them back to where they started, leading them on a mind-bending trip, trapped in a surreal nightmare.

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky (Charlie Sheen) believes he's picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to Mexico and a mysterious power plant, where is arrested for the murder of a scientist. Zane must escape with his proof of the world-shattering alien invasion in this intense sci-fi thriller.

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: Tom Cruise stars in this visually stunning fantasy adventure, in which pure good and evil battle to the death amidst spectacular surroundings. Set in a timeless mythical forest inhabited by fairies, goblins, unicorns, and mortals, the fantastic story has Tom Cruise as a mystical forest dweller chosen by fate to undertake a heroic quest. He must save a beautiful princess (Mia Sara) and defeat the demonic Lord of Darkness (Tim Curry), or the world will be plunged into a never-ending ice age.

programme.title: Hit and Run
programme.desc: A lawyer is riding high after putting a receiving a Not Guilty verdict for her client, but has to look over her shoulder when a woman she meets in a traffic accident is not all she appears to be.

programme.title: Another Man's Wife
programme.desc: After a tragic car accident, a family gets away to a remote mountain cabin to recover and rebuild their lives. During their vacation, a handsome man befriends them only to get revenge and destroy what is left of their fragile lives.

programme.title: Intimate Stranger
programme.desc: Karen, the beautiful single mother of precious 9-year-old Justin, never really had much luck with love. This all seems to change when she falls for her “Prince Charming”, Dennis, who is both a caring gentleman and a great friend to her son. But her perfect world begins to crumble when she finds a black rose on her doorstep, hears noises in the attic and gets prank calls in the middle of the night. After breaking up with Dennis her life begins to turn upside down and strange things start happening. Questioning her own sanity and left alone by authorities, friends and family, she decides to take matters into her own hands- a dangerous decision that puts her life on the line…

programme.title: Fatal Defense
programme.desc: A single mother signs up for self-defense classes from a handsome instructor. But he develops a frightening obsession with her and orchestrates an increasing deadly array of "tests" to see if she has truly learned from his lessons.

programme.title: About Us
programme.desc: A young couple revisit the location where they spent their honeymoon eight years earlier, in an effort to rekindle their troubled marriage. We watch as they navigate the beauty and the pain of love, culminating in a heartbreaking finale as truths are revealed.

programme.title: Can You Keep A Secret?
programme.desc: On a return flight from a botched client meeting, Emma reveals all of her deepest secrets to a handsome stranger when her plane hits turbulence and she believes she is going to die. Emma thinks she will never see the guy again.

programme.title: Smart People
programme.desc: A widowed professor (Dennis Quaid) experiences a new love and an unexpected visit from his adopted brother.

programme.title: Programming will resume shortly
programme.desc: We're catching up on our beauty sleep! Stay tuned for more priceless entertainment curated by Rakuten TV.

programme.title: Meet Me in New York
programme.desc: Kelly is a young, creative, ambitious events planner in New York City and quickly gaining a reputation as one of the best in the business. But when Joe, an influential website editor, hires her to organize his niece's 10th birthday party, Kelly quickly realizes that she may have just met her match.

programme.title: Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets
programme.desc: A dark force threatens Alpha, a vast metropolis and home to species from a thousand planets.

programme.title: The Curse of Sleeping Beauty
programme.desc: Thomas unexpectedly inherits a property with a mysterious curse.

programme.title: The Princess Bride
programme.desc: A farmboy-turned-pirate encounters obstacles and enemies in his quest to be reunited with his true love.

programme.title: Bridge to Terabithia
programme.desc: Jesse and Leslie are schoolmates who create an imaginary world of monsters, trolls, ogres, and giants.

programme.title: Rare Exports: A Christmas Tale
programme.desc: Do you believe in Santa Claus? On the eve of Christmas a young boy sets out to discover the truth behind several strange goings on in his small isolated village. Why have all the reindeer been slaughtered? Who took all the hairdryers and radiators? And where have all the children gone? Seal the chimney. Lock the doors. Hide your children. This year the real Santa Claus is coming to town.

programme.title: Last Days in the Desert
programme.desc: As Jesus begins his journey out of the wilderness following forty days of fasting and praying, he struggles with the Devil over the fate of a family in crisis. This powerful drama depicting an imagined chapter from Jesus' life stars Golden Globe winner Ewan McGregor (Trainspotting, Star Wars franchise), Academy Award nominee Ciarn Hinds (Belfast, Game of Thrones), and Tye Sheridan (Mud, X-Men franchise).

programme.title: 12 Days Of Giving
programme.desc: When Baxter Billings (David Blue - SGU Stargate Universe, Ugly Betty) wins a small fortune at his local shopping mall, he decides to become a Secret Santa to the people in his hometown. His anonymous philanthropy is contagious and soon enough the joy of giving at Christmas spreads across town. Along the way, Baxter forms a close friendship with Pamela (Ashley Jones - True Blood, The Bold and the Beautiful) and her young son Westin. He thinks he might be falling for Pamela... but there's one problem, he's already engaged! This Christmas, Baxter will have to choose between keeping promises or following his heart.

programme.title: Christmas at the Ranch
programme.desc: When Haley Hollis returns to her family ranch, she wasn't banking on spending so much time with with ranch hand Kate - or falling for her.

programme.title: Santa Stole Our Dog
programme.desc: A magical holiday adventure featuring original Christmas songs by Dolly Parton, and starring Golden Globe winner, Ed Asner (Elf, Up). The Whitehaven family embark on a whirlwind adventure to the North Pole when their beloved dog, Rusty, goes missing on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Holiday Spin
programme.desc: Ralph Macchio stars as a former dance champion sidelined years ago by an injury.

programme.title: THE FLIGHT BEFORE CHRISTMAS
programme.desc: Stephanie is originally planning to spend the holidays moving.

programme.title: THE FLIGHT BEFORE CHRISTMAS
programme.desc: Stephanie is originally planning to spend the holidays moving.

programme.title: The Santa Con
programme.desc: Small-time con man Nick DeMarco is ordered to take a minimum-wage job.

programme.title: Holiday Spin
programme.desc: Ralph Macchio stars as a former dance champion sidelined years ago by an injury.

programme.title: Redwood
programme.desc: Breakout film at Frightfest Festival and a must-watch for all horror fans! Josh and Beth visit a secluded national park for some quality time. Ignoring the advice of the Park Rangers, they venture off trail and come face to face with Redwood's legendary wildlife. A fresh spin to a well-worn mythology, creating an edge-of-your seat movie to shred your nerves and make you think twice about camping.

programme.title: The Farm
programme.desc: FrightFest Presents. A brutal, gore-tastic slasher/survival horror, in the vein of The Texas Chainsaw Massacre and Wolf Creek. While on a road trip a couple decide to stop at a diner. Little do they know that ordering a hamburger will have terrible consequences. Their journey soon becomes a harrowing story of survival as they are kidnapped by local farmers. On their farm, humans are the main dish.

programme.title: The Culling
programme.desc: When a group of college friends head out of town for a fun-filled long weekend, their plans change after finding a 7-year-old girl alone at an empty cafe along the highway and have no choice but to drive her home. When they arrive at her house it's quickly apparent they will have to stay the night - but what's not apparent is the living nightmare that they're about to encounter.

programme.title: Walking Out
programme.desc: Gripping, exhilarating and a whole-heartedly rich emotional rollercoaster. Fourteen-year-old urban teenager David journeys to the remote mountains of Montana to hunt big game with his estranged father. They struggle to see eye to eye and develop a bond, until a brutal encounter in the heart of the wilderness changes everything for father and son forcing them to strive to survive together.

programme.title: Hold Your Breath
programme.desc: Set on the rooftops of Paris, this gripping, high concept disaster thriller stars Olga Kurylenko (Quantum of Solace) and Romain Duris (All the money in the world). When an earthquake hits Paris, a deadly toxic mist appears, killing the inhabitants of the city. Surviving in the chaos, Mathieu and Anna must face the fog to save their daughter, who is trapped in a medical tank.

programme.title: The Christmas Ball
programme.desc: A woman visits her Aunt in England for the holidays where she meets a handsome historian who is determined to promote her Aunt manor as a historical landmark. Starring Deirdre Mullins (2020)

programme.title: Twinkle All The Way
programme.desc: Two single parents grow closer as they contribute to each other's projects: a wedding and a VIP Christmas party. Starring Sarah Drew (2019)

programme.title: Christmas On The River
programme.desc: When a woman returns home to celebrate the anniversary of the town's Sugarcane Festival, she rediscovers the magic of Christmas. Starring Jana Kramer (2019)

programme.title: The Magical Christmas Shoe
programme.desc: A pair of magical shoes help Noelle's rediscover her Christmas spirit and find love too. Starring Erin Karpluk (2019)

programme.title: Christmas Comes Home
programme.desc: A widower falls for his son's physical rehabilitation specialist.

programme.title: Love at Mariposa Beach
programme.desc: Upon returning to her place of birth, a journey of reflection causes Claire to discover love. Starring Lucía Gómez-Robledo (2022)

programme.title: Date with Love
programme.desc: Hollywood star Alex accepts a prom proposal from David an unpopular high school student, to help rebuild her profile. Alex will soon discover the Heidi has a crush on David. (2016)

programme.title: Love, Romance and Chocolate
programme.desc: Emma and chocolatier Luc compete for Belgium's Royal Chocolatier. The beauty and romance of Bruges inspire unique chocolate combinations, but will their entry win without them losing their hearts?

programme.title: Love On Repeat
programme.desc: When Amber starts re-living the same day over and over again, she realizes she is stuck in limbo and must finally decide what it will take to make her truly happy. Starring Jen Lilley (2019)

programme.title: Right in Front of Me
programme.desc: Carly bumps into her college crush and asks her new friend Nick on how to impress him. But is she sure she's got the right man? Starring Janel Parrish (2021)

programme.title: CHILTERN HUNDREDS, THE
programme.desc: Tony demands leave from his Colonel on the premise of standing as Tory Candidate for his home constituency. In fact, he has no intention of so doing, the only idea being to marry his wealthy American fiancée.

programme.title: PRESS FOR TIME
programme.desc: When Norman Shields lands a job at the Tinmouth Times, he creates complete havoc, particularly when reporting on the local beauty contest! Starring Norman Wisdom, playing four different characters, and featuring Angela Brown and Derek Bond.

programme.title: TROUBLE IN THE AIR
programme.desc: This comedy centres on the aging butler to a poor country squire. A BBC producer wants to feature the butler and squire, on his radio program. A wheeler-dealer tries to buy the squires land for less than it is worth.

programme.title: Swallows and Amazons
programme.desc: Set in 1929 and based upon Arthur Ransome's immortal children's novel, "Swallows and Amazons" is the story of a group of children who man two sailing dinghies, 'Swallow' and 'Amazon' and plan mock 'sea-battles' in the Lake District.

programme.title: Tales of Beatrix Potter
programme.desc: Jeremy Fisher, Mrs. Tiggywinke, Jemima Puddleduck, Squirrel Nutkin, Pigling Bland - indeed all the delightful and famous Beatrix Potter characters - come to life in this colorful and imaginative musical interpretation of her tales, choreographed by Sir Frederick Ashton, composed and scored by John Lanchbery and danced by members of the Royal Ballet. Five of the famed Victorian author's most well-known stories - with guest appearances of characters from other themes - have been linked to present an enchanting story-line that will thrill adults and children alike.

programme.title: Nine Bullets
programme.desc: Gypsy Moon (Lena Headey – Games of Thrones) is a novelist by day and when night falls, she dances to earn her keep.

programme.title: World's Greatest Dad
programme.desc: Lance Clayton dreamed of being a rich and famous writer, but has only managed to make it as a high school teacher. Then, in the wake of a freak accident, he is faced with the possibility of all the fortune and popularity he ever dreamed of, if he can live with the knowledge of how he got there.

programme.title: The Love Punch
programme.desc: THE LOVE PUNCH brings together Pierce Brosnan and Emma Thompson for the first time, as ex-husband and wife Richard and Kate whose biting banter suggests that the flames of their former relationship have not been fully extinguished…

programme.title: Saving Christmas
programme.desc: In this clever, crazy family adventure starring comedy legend Edward Asner, Danny and his brainy buddies launch an "X-Files"-style investigation to discover the truth about Santa. But they have no clue that St. Nick (Asner) is real—and he's making toys right in their hometown!

programme.title: The Girl With The Dragon Tattoo
programme.desc: Journalist Mikael Blomkvist is aided in his search for a woman who has been missing for forty years by Lisbeth Salander, a young computer hacker.

programme.title: The Girl With The Dragon Tattoo
programme.desc: Journalist Mikael Blomkvist is aided in his search for a woman who has been missing for forty years by Lisbeth Salander, a young computer hacker.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome To Raccoon City
programme.desc: Witness the beginning of Evil Raccoon City, which was once a booming home of pharmaceutical giant Umbrella Corporation, is now a dying Midwestern town. The company's exodus left the city a wasteland with great evil brewing below the surface. When that evil is unleashed, a group of survivors must work together to uncover the truth behind Umbrella and make it through the night.

programme.title: Gloria
programme.desc: A tough female ex-con and her recalcitrant 6-year-old charge go on the run from the mob.

programme.title: Rock The Kasbah
programme.desc: ROCK THE KASBAH is the story of 'Richie Vance,' a has-been rock manager who takes his last remaining client on a USO tour of Afghanistan. When Richie finds himself in Kabul, abandoned, penniless and without his passport, he discovers a young girl with an extraordinary voice and manages her through Afghanistan's version of 'American Idol', the wildly popular 'Afghan Star'.

programme.title: Murphy's Romance
programme.desc: Sometimes before you can fall in love, you need a little push.

programme.title: Stripes (1981)
programme.desc: STRIPES is a hilarious film with Bill Murray as an irresponsible goof-off who has just lost his job, his girl, his apartment and his car. As he ponders his fate, it occurs to him that enlisting in the Army seems to be a sensible career move. He persuades his friend to join him and soon they find themselves in boot camp surrounded by misfits.

Steven Spielberg directs this riotous farce depicting the hysteria of a cross section of Los Angeles citizens following the bombing of Pear Harbor. The film is loosely based on a true event in which a Japanese submarine surfaced off the California coast, setting off a brief wave of panic.

programme.title: The Public
programme.desc: The Public is about downtown Cincinnati librarians Stuart Goodson and Myra who see their regular winter day shaken up when homeless patrons decide to take shelter in their library for the night. What starts as a peaceful sit-in quickly escalates into a face-off with the police and the media.

programme.title: Draft Day
programme.desc: It's NFL Draft Day. General Manager Sonny Weaver Jr. controls the #1 pick. Up against fan pressure, an ambitious owner, and a hard-nosed coach, Sonny faces the biggest decision of his life.

programme.title: Life With Music
programme.desc: In this life affirming story of hope, struggling pianist (Stewart) finds inspiration with a free-spirited music critic (Holmes)

programme.title: Daisy Winters
programme.desc: Daisy Winters is about an eleven year-old girl's unconventional, yet deeply loving relationship with her mother and what happens when this essential mother/daughter bond is harshly broken.

programme.title: Last Knights
programme.desc: In an age of honour and justice by the sword, Raiden is a fallen warrior who must rise up against a corrupt and sadistic ruler to avenge Bartok, his dishonoured master.

programme.title: The Good, the Bad, the Weird
programme.desc: Set in the 1930's Manchurian desert where lawlessness rules, three Korean men fatefully meet each other on a train. Do-Won (Jung Woo-sung - The Warrior) is a bounty hunter who tracks down dangerous criminals.

programme.title: Burying Yasmeen
programme.desc: One man's odyssey to put a ring on his dead ex-wife.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer Aimes is just your average, undercover, super-assassin accustomed to a life of flashy sports cars and even flashier women. But when he meets Jen Kornfeldt, a fun-loving computer tech, he finds true love… and happily trades international intrigue for domestic bliss.

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.
